title: ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Coffee Mug with Collapsible Handles (2 Sizes)
description:
Perfect for midsize items you encounter every day, Heroclip Small gear clip lets you hook and hang commuter bags and backpacks from shelves, counters, tables, chairs, or even doors. They’re also great for hanging gravity filters from tree branches, tools from ladders, or carry-on bags from roller suitcase handles. This versatile gear clip hangs securely, rotates 360 degrees, and folds compactly in ways other carabiners, clips and hooks can’t, helping you keep your gear organized and exactly where you want it, no matter the activity. The clip also features a wider clip gate compared to standard carabiners and hooks, and a hook with a grippy rubber tip for hanging things from flat surfaces. PLEASE NOTE: This product is not designed for climbing.

ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Coffee Mug with Collapsible Handles (2 Sizes)

Enjoy your favorite brew wherever adventure takes you with the ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Camping Coffee Mug, available in 12oz or 22oz volumes. Made for morning campfire coffee, evening hot cocoa or sipping tea at the top of a mountain trial, the ASR Outdoor stainless steel mug is ready for adventure!

Designed with versatility in mind, use the coffee mugs for hot or cold drinks, soup, stews or chili, pack it with your RV accessories, camping or backpacking gear, campfire cooking equipment, your camp kitchen line up and more.

Key Features

  • CAMPING COFFEE MUG: ASR Outdoor 304 stainless steel coffee mug is the perfect companion for your outdoor adventures; include it with your camping and backpacking gear, RV accessories, campfire cooking equipment, camp kitchen line up and more
  • COLLAPSIBLE HANDLES: Equipped with folding handles for easy storage and portability; attach the coffee mug to backpacking or camping gear with a key chain or carabiner so as not to take up valuable interior packing space
  • DURABLE MATERIALS: Made from sturdy 304 stainless steel, this coffee mug is highly durable, rust and corrosion resistant and food safe, making it ideal for camping, hiking, backpacking and other outdoor activities
  • CAMPING ESSENTIALS: Whether enjoying a hot cup of coffee by the campfire or sipping tea at the top of a mountain trail, this coffee mug is lightweight, easy to clean and holds a generous 12oz or 22oz of your favorite beverage
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3 x 3.5 x 3 inches; Weight: 0.24lbs; Available in 12oz or 22oz volumes

Product Specifications

  • Color: Silver

Lightweight and holding a generous 12 or 22 ounces of your favorite beverage, this camping essentials coffee mug is made from sturdy 304 stainless steel; the mugs are highly durable, corrosion and rust resistant and food safe, making them ideal for camping, hiking and many other outdoor activities, able to withstand rugged conditions for many trips and excursions to come. And, the smooth, non reactive surface resists odors and stains for easy maintenance.

Lastly, the coffee mug is equipped with foldable or collapsible handles for easy storage and portability; attach the coffee mug to backpacking or camping gear with a key chain or carabiner so as not to take up valuable interior packing space.

Built for durability and convenience, this lightweight yet sturdy stainless steel coffee mug is designed for outdoor enthusiasts, backpackers and campers who need reliable outdoor gear. Whether you're sipping a hot drink by the campfire or fueling up on the go, this 304 stainless steel camping mug from ASR Outdoor is an essential companion for every outdoor adventure.
